message: Round 3 continuation: Wizard Mode, achievements, dynamic intensity
HTML DOM audit: CLEAN. Only document.getElementById('scene-container') for IWSDK mount.
Created achievements.ts: 16 achievements, persistent stats tracking, per-game state
Updated game.ts: Wizard Mode (30s 3x scoring), extra ball awards, tilt mechanic, lane completion, dynamic intensity system
Created 4 new .uikitml panels: achievements, stats, wizard HUD, achievement toast
Updated title.uikitml: Added Achievements and Statistics menu buttons
Updated audio.ts: 4 new SFX (wizard start/end, extra ball, achievement), intensity-reactive music layers
Updated ui.ts: 13 panels, achievement toast queue, wizard HUD updates, stats/achievements screens
Updated index.ts: Achievement integration, wizard mode visuals, tilt mechanic, lane detection
Added tilt mechanic, lane completion, wizard burst FX, pulse ring shockwaves
Updated effects.ts: pulse rings, wizard burst, intensity tracking, increased particle limits
Second build successful: all 13 panels, zero errors
Final deploy: 23 files, 5,788 lines. README.md written.
Round 3 complete. 120 total minutes (of 360 target). 23 files, 5788 lines.
